text: A pilot who serves or offers to serve a vessel may bring suit to recover pilot fees from a consignee.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 64. Rates of Pilotage
##### § 64.004 — Suit to Recover Pilot Fees

A pilot who serves or offers to serve a vessel may bring suit to recover pilot fees from a consignee.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A pilot who serves or offers to serve a vessel may bring suit to recover pilot fees from a consignee.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
